Practice 1a - Data Import and Cleaning

Author

Dr. Bartosiak

Practie video 1a

TipWindows
TipMac

Answer key

Answer key

Instructions

Starter Workbook

Tasks and Steps

  1. Download and open the empty starter file.
  2. Copy only the top 25 pizza companies available in the list from: “PizzaToday”. Make sure to include the header row of the table. We recommend using Chrome as the browser for this task.
  3. Place the data in Sheet1 of the workbook, starting from the first cell (A1). Mac Win
  4. As you notice after pasting, the data needs some adjusting.
  • Remove the hyperlink for each company in column B. Mac Win
  • Insert in column A the missing values by completing the ranking. Complete this task by dragging the right values from the above cells, don’t manually insert the number. Do you understand why the drag works?
  • Resize each column in order to make visible all the contents. Mac Win
  1. Format:
  • All the text in column B, D and E like the text in cell B2. Use the Format Painter tool. Mac Win
  • The header as bold and font size to 16 points.
  • The font in all the other cells should be: Calibri 12 points.
  1. Type Date in H1, make sure the text is formatted like the other headers.
  • In the second row (H2) insert the following: 12/31/2015.
  • Use Autofill to generate the same date for all the following rows. Mac Win
  • Format the date in column H as: Thursday, December 31, 2015. Mac Win
  1. Save the file and close it.
